list.title: Agents
list.subtitle: Create a project workspace and chat with an agent that can read and update files, research your knowledge, and run code.
list.empty: No projects yet. Create one to get started.
list.emptyLead: Each project is a workspace folder with its own files, chat sessions, and agent instructions.

workspace.resizeFilesRailHint: Drag to resize the files panel
workspace.resizeFileTreeHint: Drag to resize the file tree

chat.hero: Ask the agent to explore files, plan work, or research your knowledge base.

files.title: Project files
files.uploadFolderHint: Create the folder under {{path}} (open a subfolder first to choose another location)
files.deleteFolderConfirm: Delete folder "{{name}}" and everything inside it?
files.deleteProtected: This folder is required by the project and cannot be deleted

settings.title: Project settings
settings.agentHint: Subagents, skills, and runtime defaults. Stored in project settings.
settings.webSearchHint: Registers a web_search tool that uses the selected connector. Provider-specific options stay on the connector; the agent only passes a query. Without a connector, web search is unavailable.
settings.searchConnectorRequired: Select a search connector when web search is enabled.
settings.searchConnectorEmpty: No enabled search_tool connectors. Create one under Connectors.
settings.slugHint: Display label in the session sidebar. Workspace folder uses the project ID.
settings.invalidJson: Agent settings must be valid JSON.

gitCredentials.title: Git credentials
gitCredentials.subtitle: HTTPS personal access tokens for pull and push (never shown again after save).
gitCredentials.label: Label
